allow: Bash(curl -s --max-time 240 -X POST http://localhost:8012/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Compare the hottest and coolest tracts and explain why they differ using land cover."}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 200 -X POST http://localhost:8012/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Are there any heat anomalies at alert level or above?"}')
Bash(curl -s --max-time 200 -X POST http://localhost:8012/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Who is the mayor of Paris?"}')

Bash(curl -s --max-time 300 -X POST http://localhost:8012/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"message":"Give me a full climate briefing for Austin right now: current conditions, air quality, the single hottest forecast tract, and whether any weather alerts are active."}')
